LAUNCH APP

JOIN THE FITTIES COMMUNITY NOW TO SECURE YOUR
EARLY SPOT ON THE GROUND FLOOR OF SOMETHING GREAT

Experience smart fitness powered by computer vision via your own mobile camera device (phone or tablet).

 

Challenge yourself and your social contacts to score and rank higher!
JOIN US
 

GAMIFIED FITNESS APP

Keeping fit is hard! Workout routines turn tedious quickly and our busy lives get in the way of sticking with daily exercise.

 

The result? We miss out on a proven recipe for longer, happier and healthier living.

 

Now, with sophisticated motion tracking, high-quality fitness is finally made into an engaging and fun experience.

 

This remarkable AI enables automatic counting and scoring reps, while improving exercise form with real-time feedback!
LAUNCH APP
 

Choose favorite avatars and emoji heads to mirror your movements as you follow the trainer's form

Workouts start with warmup exercises. Just follow the trainer without counting or scoring reps

Stretch exercises enhance correct form with scores corresponding to tracked motion of body position
 

FEATURES

Computer Vision Tracks Exercise Motion on Any Camera Device

Rep Counting, Real-time Scores, and Corrective Form Feedback

Infinite Workouts with Multiple Trainers and Hundreds of Exercises

Choice of Avatars to Mirror Movements and Fitness Performance
LAUNCH APP
BENEFITS

♦ Adaptive workouts via an

      AI-based robotic trainer

 

♦ Quality fitness experience

      on your personal device

 

♦ Exercise anytime at the

      comfort of your home, or

      take it with you on the go

 

♦ Playable exercises for fun

      and social engagement

 

♦ Battle friends 1 on 1 (PvP)

      or as a group competition

 

♦ See live opponent scores

      ranked on a leaderboard

 

♦ Claim prizes and win swag

      or perks while you get fit

 

♦ Level up fitty avatars with

      proof-of-fitness on chain

 

♦ Monetize your health and

      craft valuable fitty NFTs

SOCIAL GAMING

Join the fitties community to connect with like-minded members passionate about healthy lifestyle game apps
JOIN US
 

ADAPTIVE WORKOUTS

Adaptive workouts for all fitness skill levels.

 

Choose from a wide variety of customized workouts by difficulty, duration, objective, muscle groups focus, and more.

 

Workouts are compiled from a curated list of 100's of exercises that are performed by four professional fitness trainers.

 

The extensive exercises collection spans a myriad of standing and floor exercises, body weight, plus the optional use of dumbbells, ankle weights, resistance bands and more.

 

New workouts are continually added to the library based on community interests, with auto-generated workouts planned for the near future.
LAUNCH APP
 

Note: Your video is only used to analyze correct form and count reps, it is not captured nor shared outside your device.

FUN FITNESS EXPERIENCE

For the first time, high-quality personal training is available at your fingertips!

 

Conveniently work out anytime, anywhere right on your phone (tablets and laptops work too, just launch the app on any popular web browser).

 

Choose your favorite avatar (skeleton shader and head emoji) to mirror your movements. Get feedback while following the exercises demonstrated by the trainer.

 

Each exercise is timed, rep counted and scored, all automated by AI and computer vision. Each rest shows the scores of the previous exercise at the bottom timer bar.
LAUNCH APP
